reference: Hello, ten% is too low. The only possible solution is an intraventricular cardiac device, followed by heart transplantation. It is a significant operation and will require a substantial amount of money. ten% cannot be managed by medication; the patient would land in cardiac arrest.
text: Hello, ten percent is too low. The only possible solution is an intraventricular cardiac device, followed by heart transplantation. It is a significant operation and will require a substantial amount of money. Ten percent cannot be managed by medication; the patient would land in cardiac arrest.
